hero.headline: Savoring Filipino Flavors 24/7
hero.description: HAPAG is a 24-hour restaurant serving authentic Filipino dishes in a fun and relaxing atmosphere. With live band entertainment from Monday to Friday, we offer a unique dining experience. Our mezzanine area is also available for events and gatherings.

gallery.headline: Signature Dishes
gallery.subheadline: A taste of authentic Filipino cuisine

items.title: Adobo Fiesta
items.description: Our signature adobo dish made with tender chicken and savory sauce, served with steamed rice. This classic Filipino dish is a must-try. We use only the freshest ingredients to ensure the best flavor.

testimonial.author: Maria Rodriguez
testimonial.quote: I've tried adobo in many restaurants, but HAPAG's version is the best. The flavors are so rich and authentic. I highly recommend it!

items.title: Lechon Kawali Savory
items.description: Indulge in our crispy lechon kawali, served with a side of liver sauce and steamed vegetables. This Filipino favorite is perfect for any occasion. Our chefs use a secret recipe to achieve the perfect crunch.

testimonial.author: Mark Santos
testimonial.quote: HAPAG's lechon kawali is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. I love it! The live band entertainment made the experience even more enjoyable.

items.title: Sinigang Soup
items.description: Warm up with our sour and savory sinigang soup, made with fresh tamarind broth and your choice of protein. This comforting dish is a staple in Filipino cuisine. We use only the freshest ingredients to ensure the best flavor.

testimonial.author: Liza Reyes
testimonial.quote: HAPAG's sinigang soup is a breath of fresh air. The flavors are so bold and refreshing. I've been coming back for more!
